sentences.target: Die Reporterin wartet vor dem Rathaus.

translations.de: Die Reporterin wartet vor dem Rathaus.
translations.en: The reporter waits outside the town hall.
translations.es: La reportera espera fuera del ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: La journaliste attend devant l'hôtel de ville.
translations.it: La giornalista aspetta fuori dal municipio.
translations.zh-Hans: 女记者在市政厅外等候。
translations.yue: 女記者喺市政大樓門外等候。
translations.pt: A repórter espera do lado de fora da prefeitura.
translations.vi: Nữ phóng viên đứng chờ bên ngoài tòa thị chính.
translations.nl: De verslaggeefster wacht buiten het stadhuis.
translations.hu: A riporternő a városháza előtt vár.
translations.hi: महिला रिपोर्टर नगर भवन के बाहर इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.el: Η δημοσιογράφος περιμένει έξω από το δημαρχείο.
translations.id: Seorang reporter menunggu di luar balai kota.
translations.ja: 女性記者は市役所の外で待っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determines the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Preposition governing dative; expresses static location.
Definite article; dative neuter singular; required by 'vor' with 'Rathaus'.
Common noun; neuter; dative singular; object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Ich spreche kurz mit der Reporterin.

translations.de: Ich spreche kurz mit der Reporterin.
translations.en: I speak briefly with the reporter.
translations.es: Hablo un momento con la reportera.
translations.fr: Je parle un moment avec la journaliste.
translations.it: Parlo un attimo con la giornalista.
translations.zh-Hans: 我和女记者简单聊几句。
translations.pt: Eu falo rapidamente com a repórter.
translations.vi: Tôi nói chuyện một chút với nữ phóng viên.
translations.nl: Ik praat kort met de verslaggeefster.
translations.hi: मैं रिपोर्टर से थोड़ी देर बात करता हूँ.
translations.el: Μιλάω για λίγο με τη δημοσιογράφο.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Adverb; modifies the verb to indicate short duration.
Preposition governing dative; marks comitative relation.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; with 'Reporterin' after 'mit'.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Die Reporterin stellt eine einfache Frage.

translations.de: Die Reporterin stellt eine einfache Frage.
translations.en: The reporter asks a simple question.
translations.es: La reportera hace una pregunta sencilla.
translations.fr: La journaliste pose une question simple.
translations.it: La giornalista fa una domanda semplice.
translations.zh-Hans: 女记者问一个简单的问题。
translations.yue: 女記者問一個簡單嘅問題。
translations.pt: A repórter faz uma pergunta simples.
translations.vi: Nữ phóng viên đặt một câu hỏi đơn giản.
translations.nl: De verslaggeefster stelt een eenvoudige vraag.
translations.hu: A riporternő feltesz egy egyszerű kérdést.
translations.hi: रिपोर्टर एक आसान प्रश्न पूछती है.
translations.el: Η δημοσιογράφος κάνει μια απλή ερώτηση.
translations.ja: 記者が簡単な質問をする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determines the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking an accusative object.
Indefinite article; accusative feminine singular; determines 'Frage'.
Attributive adjective; positive degree; agrees with 'Frage' (accusative feminine singular).
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object.

sentences.target: Neben mir fotografiert die Reporterin schnell.

translations.de: Neben mir fotografiert die Reporterin schnell.
translations.en: Next to me, the reporter takes photos quickly.
translations.es: A mi lado, la reportera saca fotos rápidamente.
translations.fr: À côté de moi, la journaliste prend des photos rapidement.
translations.it: Accanto a me, la giornalista scatta foto rapidamente.
translations.ko: 내 옆에서 여기자가 빠르게 사진을 찍는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 在我旁边，女记者迅速拍照。
translations.yue: 喺我身邊，女記者好快咁影相。
translations.ru: Рядом со мной журналистка быстро фотографирует.
translations.pt: Ao meu lado, a repórter tira fotos rapidamente.
translations.vi: Bên cạnh tôi, nữ phóng viên chụp ảnh rất nhanh.
translations.nl: Naast mij maakt de verslaggeefster snel foto’s.
translations.uk: Поруч зі мною журналістка швидко фотографує.
translations.hi: मेरे पास ही रिपोर्टर तेज़ी से तस्वीरें ले रही है.
translations.pl: Obok mnie dziennikarka szybko robi zdjęcia.
translations.el: Δίπλα μου, η δημοσιογράφος βγάζει φωτογραφίες γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Ved siden av meg tar reporteren raskt bilder.
translations.id: Di sebelah saya, reporter dengan cepat mengambil foto.
translations.sv: Bredvid mig tar reportern snabbt bilder.
translations.ro: Lângă mine, reportera face poze rapid.
translations.da: Ved siden af mig tager reporteren hurtigt billeder.
translations.ja: 私の隣で記者が素早く写真を撮る。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a preposed locative PP.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; object of 'neben'.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate (verb-second after fronted PP).
Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determines the post-verbal subject noun.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb.
